questions.question: Which band performed the legendary song Bohemian Rhapsody?
questions.explanation: Bohemian Rhapsody is a song by Queen, released in 1975.

questions.question: Which band performed the song Stairway to Heaven?
questions.explanation: Stairway to Heaven is a legendary Led Zeppelin song from 1971.

questions.question: Which member of The Beatles was murdered in 1980?
questions.explanation: John Lennon was shot in 1980. December 8 in New York.

questions.question: Which band performed Smells Like Teen Spirit?
questions.explanation: Smells Like Teen Spirit is a Nirvana hit that became an anthem of the grunge movement.

questions.question: Who was the lead singer of The Rolling Stones?
questions.explanation: Mick Jagger - The Rolling Stones vocalist since the band's formation in 1962.

questions.question: Which band made the album The Dark Side of the Moon?
questions.explanation: The Dark Side of the Moon (1973) is one of Pink Floyd's best-selling albums.

questions.question: Which guitarist is considered one of the greatest of all time and played the guitar left-handed?
questions.explanation: Jimi Hendrix is ​​the legendary left-handed guitarist who changed rock music.

questions.question: Which band performed Back in Black?
questions.explanation: Back in Black is a 1980 album and song by AC/DC.

questions.question: Which band performed Hotel California?
questions.explanation: Hotel California is a classic song by The Eagles from 1977.

questions.question: Which nationality was freddie mercury?
questions.explanation: Freddie Mercury was born in Zanzibar (now Tanzania) to a Parsi family, then lived in Great Britain.
